messages.message: They're sending more cops now!
WE GOT SNAKE THEFT AUTO BEFORE *** 6 ????!!!
Mr snake and Ms witch, we assure you to stop before something worse happens!
please stop
here goes our TAX moneey
STAR METER GOING UP FAST
theres a bounty on his head now, calling dibs
is martial law about to be declared??
congrats youre officially on the watchlist now
interpol just issued a red notice, wild
this is gonna need a presidential address
calling in the national guard at this point
emergency broadcast system just activated
officially the most wanted creature alive
my taxes are funding this entire chase
city wide curfew incoming, mark my words
every news chopper in the state is here now
theyre tracking him by satellite now, overkill
this feels like the start of martial order
we just hit five stars, this is GTA levels now
swat is being called in, brace yourselves
airspace officially locked down over the city
roadblocks set up on every single highway
state of emergency declared, this is huge
the bounty board just updated, hes top of the list
the president is reportedly being briefed rn
full military mobilization happening live
this is now the top story on every channel
congrats you are now legally a fugitive
wanted posters already printed, thats fast
evacuation orders just went out citywide
press conference happening in 10 minutes
government response team has been deployed
the reward money just doubled, someones desperate
martial law officially declared in the district
every police chopper in the region is circling now
officially classified as a national threat now
emergency cabinet meeting called immediately
tracking exactly how much this chase is costing us
the skywatch sentinels are all activated now
federal agents just joined the chase, escalating fast
wanted level climbing way too fast, hes a legend now
every major road just got closed off
martial response teams deploying across the city
this might end up in front of the security council
public safety alert just hit every phone in the city
the governor is reportedly on a call right now
breaking news desk has been running nonstop coverage
the entire bounty hunter guild just got a notice
martial presence growing block by block now
citizen alert system just triggered city wide
every emergency service is being deployed at once
this taskforce alone costs more than my whole salary
red alert status confirmed across all districts
military escalation level just went up another notch
the commissioner just made an emergency statement
this is now international news, unbelievable
wanted status upgraded to maximum priority
full security lockdown across downtown now
an entire pursuit team has been assigned just for this
threat level officially upgraded to critical
emergency funds being pulled to deal with this
city wide alert sirens going off right now
military checkpoints set up on every bridge
bounty escalating by the minute, this is wild
a whole new government taskforce just got formed
national attention fully locked onto this chase now
press briefing scheduled for the top of the hour
emergency alert just buzzed on my phone too
every available security force is being mobilized
pursuit escalation level reaching its peak now
federal response team officially on site
this is now a record breaking wanted level
this might genuinely be a martial law moment
the entire city is on lockdown as we speak
escalation level off the charts at this point
pursuit protocol level five just activated
bounty board crashed from too many viewers checking it
martial response units pouring in from every district
national security council in emergency session now
this is the most expensive chase in city history probably
sky patrol units doubled in the last ten minutes
emergency order signed by the mayor moments ago
wanted level capped out, system cant go higher
city council in absolute chaos over this right now
federal lockdown procedures officially in effect
even the pursuers are getting tired at this point
the whole downtown is now a martial zone
bounty climbing faster than the stock market ever has
emergency airspace restriction now in full effect
this counts as a national chaos event at this point
press room in full panic mode right now
security escalation hitting levels never seen before
gov officials reportedly arguing over the next move
sirens blaring nonstop across the whole city now
martial law update expected within the hour
threat escalation just triggered another alert tier
pursuit system completely overloaded right now
yet another emergency team deployed, how many is that now
this is going down as the biggest wanted event ever
